label: AirPods Max (Gen 1), A2DP
notes: Measured with a physical SPL meter held at the ear cup.
AirPods Max are active headphones. The on-head wear sensor was blocked so the internal DSP did not ramp the level during the steady tone.
Replace device_node_hint with your own node name from: wpctl inspect @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ | grep node.name
